name: gemini-api-local
description: Local Gemini API configuration for the OCR app. The API key is loaded from GEMINI_API_KEY in .env; do not hardcode secrets here.
notes: This is an MCP-style local config reference for agents/tools.
Actual OCR app usage is implemented in app/llm/.
Use Google AI Studio to view authoritative project-level rate limits and quota.

business_card_extraction_guidance.front_side_priority: Use the front side as the primary source for person name, designation, company/business, email, website, and direct contact numbers.
company_detection: The company/business name is usually the top-most stylized logo or brand text on the front side.
The logo may be top-left or top-right and may be graphic/stylized rather than normal OCR body text.
Do not use branch names, office labels, building names, slogans, service-list headings, address landmarks, or back-side product lists as the company name.
back_side_handling: Back sides often contain branch addresses, support facilities, product/service outlines, product photos, safety slogans, and we-sell lists.
Use back-side text for address and category support.
Do not replace front-side contact details with back-side branch-office numbers unless the front side is missing that field.
ignore_visual_noise: Ignore QR codes, decorative icons, certification icons, product photos, separators, and handwritten notes unless printed text beside them is a contact field.
validation_rules: Email must contain @ and a valid domain.
Website must be a printed domain or URL, not guessed from email unless separately printed.
For country_code, explicit phone prefixes such as +62, +91, and +971 win over address guesses.
If phone fields already include a prefix, separate country_code from local phone_number/mobile_number/fax_number.
